data.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Continues Loads Up On $6.05M Worth Of Robinhood Shares Amid Bitcoin Rebound, Dumps Zoom Stock
data.description: On Thursday, Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest made some significant trades, notably buying Robinhood Markets Inc (NASDAQ:HOOD) and selling Zoom Video Communications Inc (NASDAQ:ZM).

data.title: STATES 2.0 Act: A New Dawn For Federal Cannabis Policy?
data.description: STATES 2.0 Act aims to end federal marijuana prohibition, legalize cannabis nationwide, and allow interstate commerce, reshaping the U.S. cannabis industry

data.title: Mark Cuban Denies Rumors Of Leaving US If Trump Wins In 2024 After Backing Kamala Harris: 'I Love This Country'
data.description: Mark Cuban, the billionaire entrepreneur and "Shark Tank" star, has denied rumors suggesting that he would leave the United States if Donald Trump were to win the 2024 presidential election.

data.title: California's War On Illegal Cannabis: $120M Seized, 37 Tons Of Marijuana Destroyed So Far In 2024
data.description: California's task force seizes over $120 million in illegal cannabis since January 2024, targeting unlicensed operations.

data.title: Palantir Co-Founder Joe Lonsdale Concurs On AI Not Driving Immediate Growth: 'We've Failed So Far Because It's Not Impacting The Entire Economy Right Away'
data.description: Joe Lonsdale, co-founder of Palantir Technologies, discussed on CNBC the significant impact of AI on the U.S. services industry and the future challenges for big tech, particularly highlighting Palantir's success amid market volatility and skepticism about AI's immediate benefits for Apple.
